name: AAPT21KaryotypeSchedule
title: AAP T21 Karyotype Confirmation Schedule
description: Karyotype analysis to confirm Trisomy 21 diagnosis per AAP guidelines. Should be performed prenatally where possible; if no prior karyotype result documenting Trisomy 21 exists, a single karyotype analysis should be performed at any point from the prenatal period through age 21.

action.title: Confirmatory Karyotype Analysis
action.description: Order a karyotype analysis if no prior karyotype result documenting Trisomy 21 is recorded.

expression.description: Applies when no prior karyotype Observation (LOINC 29770-5) with a value of Complete trisomy 21 syndrome (SNOMED 41040004) is recorded. If no such positive karyotype is found, a confirmatory karyotype is scheduled.
